title: Digital gold bought via UPI (monthly value)

metadata.method: NPCI UPI Merchant Category Classification, 'Digital Gold' category, monthly transaction value. Compiled from NPCI monthly disclosures (via Dataful/press); selected verified waypoints, not every month.
metadata.note: Volume rose ~377% (21M->100M transactions) Apr-2024 to Aug-2025; digital gold was promoted from 'All Other' to 'Medium Transacting' category in May 2025. A proper full monthly scrape of NPCI is a follow-up.
